_comment: 1765 Apparel autonomous shorts bank. Each entry renders via the proven kinetic-typography template (short_template_dd.html) -> mp4 -> posts as IG Reel + FB video. The engine cycles this bank on the pm slot; add entries to extend. Voice = bold/POV; every claim maps to locked brand facts (American-made dirt-to-shirt, Bayside 5100 6.1oz, $44.99, veteran-owned, 1765=Stamp Act). Born 2026-06-13.

shorts.ig_caption:
It's not merch. It's a uniform.

1765 Apparel — God & Country. Grown, milled, cut, sewn, and printed in the USA. 6.1oz heavyweight Bayside 5100, built to outlast the season. No sweatshops. No imports dressed up as patriotism.

Wear what you believe → 1765apparelco.com
#AmericanMade #MadeInUSA #GodAndCountry #PatrioticApparel #VeteranOwned #CatholicApparel #1765
shorts.fb_message:
It's not merch. It's a uniform — for the man who knows what he stands for. American-made, dirt to shirt, built to last.
https://1765apparelco.com

beats.sub: For the man who knows what he stands for.

beats.quote: You don't wear a logo. You wear a creed.

shorts.ig_caption:
Why isn't this a $12 shirt?

Because nobody ate the difference. US-grown cotton. Milled in America. Cut and sewn in America — by hands earning an American wage. 6.1oz heavyweight, built to outlast years, not a season.

The honest price → 1765apparelco.com
#AmericanMade #MadeInUSA #GodAndCountry #DirtToShirt #VeteranOwned #1765
shorts.fb_message:

beats.big: Grown, milled, cut, sewn in America.

shorts.ig_caption:
When there's no earthly court left to hear you — one appeal still stands open.

An Appeal to Heaven. The Pine Tree banner of the Revolution; Locke's last resort, carried into the founding fight. Now a back-print on American-made heavyweight cotton.

→ 1765apparelco.com
#AppealToHeaven #AmericanMade #MadeInUSA #GodAndCountry #1765 #America250

shorts.ig_caption:
He doesn't ask for a corner of your life. He claims the throne.

Christus Rex — King of Nations, rendered as the Church has always proclaimed Him. Back-printed on American-made 6.1oz heavyweight cotton. Veteran-owned.

Wear the conviction → 1765apparelco.com
#ChristusRex #CatholicApparel #GodAndCountry #AmericanMade #MadeInUSA #1765

shorts.ig_caption:
Why 1765?

The year the Crown taxed the colonies without a single American voice — and the colonies answered with the first organized American "no." Eleven years before the Declaration, the fuse was already lit.

We don't wear a date. We wear a decision → 1765apparelco.com
#1765 #America250 #AmericanMade #GodAndCountry #MadeInUSA #Patriotic
